name: Infected Soldier Ant

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It closes the gap and bites head-on like a normal soldier ant.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or take a short sidestep; on its own it is easy to read.
attacks.notes: It is the base of almost every follow-up string it uses.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It leans into the target and chains three heavy bites with very little downtime.
attacks.howToAvoid: Hold your block to the end or retreat after the first hit if you have room.
attacks.notes: This is its most common pattern once it has already closed onto the player.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It pulls back for a brief moment before committing to a stronger bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Side-step or parry when you spot the short wind-up.
attacks.notes: It serves the same purpose as on a normal soldier ant: punishing players who block late or stand still.

attacks.name: Stunning Bite
attacks.tell: It lowers its head and goes for a short bite meant to leave you stunned and open.
attacks.howToAvoid: If more enemies are nearby, this is the bite you most want to deny with a parry or perfect block.
attacks.notes: Its raw damage is not the scary part; the control it creates is.

description: An infected version of a red, black, or fire soldier ant that appears in anthills ruled by an Infected Ant Queen. It keeps the pressure of a high-tier soldier ant, but turns it against its own colony.
behavior: It behaves almost exactly like any other soldier ant, except that it also attacks the healthy members of the same anthill. That causes frequent infighting and leaves whole tunnels in chaos.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile to the player on sight and cannot be pacified. If you arrive while it is already fighting normal ants, you can exploit that damage and finish it quickly.
interactionWithCreatures: It protects Infected Ants and fights almost any other nearby creature, especially the non-infected ants of the same colony.
strategy: Even though it hits like a fire soldier, it is not usually the hardest encounter of the tier because the anthill often weakens it for you. The important detail is that this variant does not fear Fresh: Spicy and stabbing perform better here.
environments: Anthills with an Infected Ant Queen

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 84
3-Combo Bite: 60
Charged Bite: 108
Stunning Bite: 48

specialTraits: Unlike most infected creatures, this variant is not weak to Fresh and actually resists it. It strongly looks like inherited resistance from the base black soldier ant.
